All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractDiscoveryComponent
Base class for Discovery HST components.
AbstractDiscoveryComponent.DataSourceResult
Holds the result of AbstractDiscoveryComponent.resolveDataSource(org.hippoecm.hst.core.component.HstRequest, java.lang.String): the optional search/category result and whether a matching data-source component is wired to the given label.
ApiResponseBody
 
AutosuggestQuery
 
AutosuggestResponse
 
AutosuggestResponse.AttributeSuggestion
 
AutosuggestResponse.QueryContext
 
AutosuggestResponse.QuerySuggestion
 
AutosuggestResponse.SuggestionGroup
 
AutosuggestResult
 
AutosuggestResult.AttributeSuggestion
 
CachingDiscoveryConfigProvider
 
Campaign
 
CampaignDto
 
CategoryHighlight
Clean record representing a curated category tile in the Category Highlight component.
CategoryPreviewCache
JVM-level TTL cache for category preview products.
CategoryQuery
 
ClientContext
Carries browser identity headers extracted from an incoming HST request.
ConfigBackedDiscoveryResourceResolver
CRISP resolver that derives its base URI from the shared Discovery settings.
ConfigDefaults
Coded defaults for structural (non-sensitive) Discovery configuration.
ConfigurationException
 
CrispResourceServiceBrokerFactory
Resolves the CRISP broker from the active HST component manager at bean-creation time.
DeferredPixelEvent
 
DiscoveryApiClient
 
DiscoveryBrUid2Service
 
DiscoveryCategoryBean
 
DiscoveryCategoryComponent
 
DiscoveryCategoryComponentInfo
 
DiscoveryCategoryHighlightComponent
Renders a grid of category navigation tiles sourced from up to 4 JCR brxdis:categoryDocument pickers.
DiscoveryCategoryHighlightComponentInfo
 
DiscoveryChannelConfigReader
Resolves per-channel Discovery credential overrides.
DiscoveryChannelInfo
Channel Manager parameters for Discovery credential overrides and pixel tracking.
DiscoveryClient
 
DiscoveryClientImpl
Thin Discovery facade that delegates core API, recommendation, and pixel work to focused collaborators while keeping the public addon API stable.
DiscoveryConfig
 
DiscoveryConfigJcrListener
 
DiscoveryConfigProvider
 
DiscoveryConfigProviderServiceRegistration
Registers the site DiscoveryConfigProvider in HippoServiceRegistry so sibling addon-module contexts such as CRISP can resolve it without direct Spring bean references.
DiscoveryConfigReader
 
DiscoveryConfigResolver
 
DiscoveryCredentials
 
DiscoveryDataSourceComponentInfo
 
DiscoveryException
 
DiscoveryFacetComponent
View component that reads facets from a parent data-fetching component's cached result.
DiscoveryHttpGateway
Thin HTTP transport for CMS picker requests.
DiscoveryModelKeys
Typed string constants for every request.setModel(key, value) call made by Discovery HST components.
DiscoveryPickerModule
Daemon module that registers the Discovery product picker JAX-RS endpoint with brXM's RepositoryJaxrsService.
DiscoveryPickerResource
CMS JAX-RS endpoint used by the Discovery product picker Open UI extension.
DiscoveryPixelService
Fires server-side Discovery pixel events asynchronously after each result is fetched.
DiscoveryPixelServiceImpl
 
DiscoveryPixelTransport
 
DiscoveryProductDetailBean
 
DiscoveryProductDetailComponent
 
DiscoveryProductDetailComponentInfo
 
DiscoveryProductGridComponent
View component that reads products from a parent data-fetching component's cached result.
DiscoveryProductHighlightComponent
Renders a curated product showcase from up to 4 hand-picked brxdis:productDetailDocument pickers.
DiscoveryProductHighlightComponentInfo
 
DiscoveryRecommendationBean
 
DiscoveryRecommendationComponent
 
DiscoveryRecommendationComponentInfo
 
DiscoveryRequestCache
Request-scoped deduplication cache for Discovery API results.

PixelFlags
Carries per-request pixel control flags resolved from env/system properties and channel parameters.

ProductSummary
 
QueryParamParser
 
QueryParamParser.RequestParamProvider
Simple interface abstracting HST/servlet request parameter access so the parser can be tested without a full HST request.

RecommendationResponse.WidgetMetadata
 
RecommendationResult
Domain result for a recommendation widget call.

SearchRequestOptions
Value object for optional per-request search and browse parameters.
SearchResponse
 
SearchResult
 
SoREnrichmentProvider
Optional SPI for enriching Discovery product summaries with live commerce data (e.g. price, stock) from a System of Record at render time.
